title: Xtra Rich Polish Cheese Dumplings
description: A rich and romantic Polish dish featuring egg roll wrappers and a low-fat friendly cheese filling, perfect for a special occasion.

ingredients.name: egg roll wrappers
ingredients.notes: found in the frozen food section

instructions: Preheat the oven to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a large bowl, combine the reduced fat cream cheese, shredded cheddar cheese, chopped fresh dill, chopped scallions, salt, and black pepper, and mix until well combined.
Lay an egg roll wrapper on a flat surface and place a tablespoon of the cheese mixture in the center of the wrapper.
Brush the edges of the wrapper with the beaten egg for a secure seal.
Fold the wrapper into a triangle by bringing the two opposite corners together to form a point, and press the edges together to seal the dumpling.
Repeat the process with the remaining wrappers and cheese mixture.
Place the dumplings on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, leaving about 1 inch of space between each dumpling.
Brush the tops of the dumplings with the remaining egg wash.
Bake the dumplings in the preheated oven for 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
Serve the dumplings hot and enjoy.
